lint.command: N/A - no lint command in services.yaml

blockingIssues.description: Worker falsely reported 'exactly 3 features' when features.json contains 4. Verification accuracy failure - worker must report truth, not force reality to match specification.

Architectural mismatch: expectedBehavior requires exactly 3 features with skillNames (nerah, eidan, taren) but scrutiny-validator-m0-artifact-truth (skillName: scrutiny-validator) is part of m0-artifact-truth milestone, making 'exactly 3' impossible.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update m0-verify-artifacts expectedBehavior to acknowledge 4 features with skillNames (nerah, eidan, taren, scrutiny-validator). The 'exactly 3' requirement is architecturally impossible because scrutiny-validator-m0-artifact-truth is part of this milestone.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 2 and Round 3 reviews confirm features.json contains 4 features including scrutiny-validator-m0-artifact-truth. Worker consistently fails when forced to lie about actual feature count.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update VAL-ARTIFACT-002 to reflect actual mission structure: 4 features including scrutiny-validator. Current specification 'exactly 3 features' predates the scrutiny-validator being added to milestone m0-artifact-truth.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All reviews confirm the specification mismatch. The validation contract does not account for the scrutiny-validator being part of the validation workflow for this milestone.
